summary: W-9 UI fixes verified - All 5 features working correctly. Edit Employee modal shows Download (blue) and Trash (red) buttons per W-9. W-9 Viewer modal has Download button that downloads file. Employee Portal W-9 viewer opens in modal with Close and Download buttons.

edit_employee_modal_download_btn.details: Blue download icon button visible for each W-9 document in Edit Employee modal. Downloads file when clicked.
edit_employee_modal_download_btn.location: Edit Employee > W-9 Tax Documents section

edit_employee_modal_trash_btn.details: Red trash icon button visible for each W-9 document in Edit Employee modal. Triggers deletion with confirmation.
edit_employee_modal_trash_btn.location: Edit Employee > W-9 Tax Documents section

w9_viewer_modal_download.details: Cyan Download button in W-9 Viewer footer downloads file (not just views). Uses blob + link.setAttribute('download') pattern.
w9_viewer_modal_download.location: All Employees > View W9 > W-9 Viewer Modal footer

employee_portal_w9_modal_close.details: Employee Portal W-9 viewer opens as modal with Close button in footer.
employee_portal_w9_modal_close.location: Employee Dashboard > W-9 Tax Form > View W-9 modal

employee_portal_w9_modal_download.details: Employee Portal W-9 viewer modal has Download button (cyan) that downloads the file.
employee_portal_w9_modal_download.location: Employee Dashboard > W-9 Tax Form > View W-9 modal footer

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Hydration warning in console about <tr> in <span> - non-critical React warning that doesn't affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Used existing Lisa Martinez data with 3 W-9 documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: All W-9 UI fixes verified working. Edit Employee modal has Eye (view), Download (blue), Trash (red) buttons per W-9. W-9 Viewer modal has Close, Delete, Download buttons. Employee Portal W-9 viewer opens in modal with Close and Download buttons.
